title: Synthetic Control Brief
summary: Public-safe brief for a fictional implementation-control loop.

title: Document Service Baseline
summary: Synthetic accepted baseline for a document service implementation scope.

title: Document Service Human Projection
summary: Generated human-readable projection used for review, not canonical truth.

title: Document Service Semantic Review
summary: Review that identifies whether the projection preserves canonical baseline meaning.

title: Contract Skeleton Batch
summary: Synthetic implementation batch that prepares contract skeletons without executing production changes.

title: Contract Skeleton Evidence Pack
summary: Evidence pack containing implementation summary, tests, smoke notes and deviation notes.

title: Contract Skeleton Graph Sync Proposal
summary: Proposal to update canonical graph state after evidence and review.

title: Coordinator Approval Gate
summary: Approval gate required before the sync proposal becomes a controlled canonical update.

title: Accepted Contract Skeleton Update
summary: Controlled update representing an approved canonical graph change.

title: Contract Skeleton Ready
summary: Implementation state recorded after approval, not before evidence review.

title: Generated Context As Authorization
summary: Risk that generated context is mistaken for permission to change canonical or runtime state.

title: Separate Proposal From Update
summary: Process improvement: keep sync proposals separate from approved updates in all implementation workflows.
